title: Amtech - Tile Grout Float for Even Spreading and Smooth Finish, Home DIY, Dual-Edged Design, Durable with High-Density Foam Pad and Aluminium Plate, Rounded Corners Prevent Damage (24 x 10cm)
features: EVEN SPREADING: This tile grouting float has a high density foam pad covered with a rubber base and bonded to an aluminium plate to ensure spreading
VERSATILE: This tile grout remover has bevelled edges, one with rounded corners and the other with square corners
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
